steps.name: Understand Intent

steps.name: Run Discovery
steps.result: 11 skills, 1 agent, 0 lessons. Key related: context-ingest (has routing logic), document-standards.md (has type definitions)

steps.name: Gather Context
steps.result: document-standards.md defines 5 types with examples. context-ingest handles post-onboarding routing. Template already supports all types. Onboarding skill hardcodes type:context and limits clusters to 2-4.

intent.description: Upgrade context-onboarding skill to classify content into all 5 document types during onboarding
